# Brainstormer

> Structured planning toolkit that takes ideas from rough concept to dev-ready
> deliverables — PRD, phased plan, and dependency-ordered GitHub issues.

## Skills

- [Ask — Discovery Interview](skills/ask/SKILL.md): Pressure-test ideas through structured client interviews covering problem, users, business model, constraints, and domain-specific concerns
- [Blueprint — PRD Creation](skills/blueprint/SKILL.md): Formalize discovery output into a Product Requirements Document, submitted as a GitHub issue
- [Carve — PRD to Plan](skills/carve/SKILL.md): Break a PRD into tracer-bullet vertical slices saved as a phased implementation plan in ./plans/
- [Dispatch — PRD to Issues](skills/dispatch/SKILL.md): Convert a PRD into dependency-ordered GitHub issues classified as AFK or HITL
- [Lean — MVP Advisor](skills/lean/SKILL.md): Check any decision against MVP principles — speed over perfection, utility first, simplicity
- [TDD — Test-Driven Development](skills/tdd/SKILL.md): Red-green-refactor workflow using vertical slices, with GitHub issue and plan integration
- [Brainstorm — Full Workflow](skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md): Orchestrated workflow guiding through all phases from discovery to issue creation
- [Ship — Lint, Commit & Push](skills/ship/SKILL.md): Lint, type-check, commit, and push in one flow
- [Improve CLAUDE.md — Structured Optimization](skills/improve-claude-md/SKILL.md): Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files by wrapping sections in conditional importance tags, removing linter overlap, and ensuring project accuracy
- [LLM Council — Multi-Advisor Analysis](skills/llm-council/SKILL.md): Run a question through 5 AI advisors who analyze independently, peer-review anonymously, then synthesize a verdict
- [Agent CLI — Design & Audit](skills/agent-cli/SKILL.md): Design and audit CLIs intended for AI agents using ten agent-native principles (Tier 1 table stakes + Tier 2 compounding) and a Blocker/Friction/Optimization severity rubric across six command classes (read/mutate/stream/bootstrap/async/config)
- [Handoff — Chat-to-Handoff Distillation](skills/handoff/SKILL.md): Capture the current chat as a lossless structured handoff (.md + .txt) for Codex, Cursor, or other IDE-based agents
- [React Audit — Phase 2b Smart Scan](skills/react-audit/SKILL.md): Audit a React/TSX repository for React anti-patterns, file one GitHub issue per finding via gh CLI; Phase 2b adds the Smart Scan front step (enumerateScanTargets, canonical exclusion list, interactive threshold prompt at SMART_SCAN_THRESHOLD=50) on top of Phase 2a's 11-card effects dispatch

## Templates & References

- [PRD Template](skills/blueprint/references/prd-template.md): Structure for Product Requirements Documents
- [Plan Template](skills/carve/references/plan-template.md): Structure for phased implementation plans
- [Issue Template](skills/dispatch/references/issue-template.md): Structure for GitHub dev issues
- [Vertical Slice Rules](skills/carve/references/vertical-slice-rules.md): Rules for tracer-bullet slicing
- [Vertical Slice Rules (Dispatch copy)](skills/dispatch/references/vertical-slice-rules.md): Identical copy of carve's vertical-slice-rules.md, used by /dispatch
- [Question Format](skills/ask/references/question-format.md): Interview question numbering and formatting
- [Mocking Patterns](skills/tdd/references/mocking.md): DI, SDK wrappers, and good vs bad mock examples
- [CLAUDE.md Template](skills/improve-claude-md/references/claude-md-template.md): Ideal structure for CLAUDE.md files with conditional importance tags
- [Important-If Catalog](skills/improve-claude-md/references/important-if-catalog.md): Curated conditions for wrapping CLAUDE.md sections by domain
- [Council Playbook](skills/llm-council/references/council-playbook.md): Advisor personas and prompt templates for the LLM Council
- [CLI Principles](skills/agent-cli/references/cli-principles.md): Ten agent-native CLI principles (Tier 1 table stakes + Tier 2 compounding) with rationale, worked examples, and architectural backstop note for codegen-driven CLIs
- [CLI Audit Checklist](skills/agent-cli/references/audit-checklist.md): Per-principle audit checks with severity mapping by command class (read/mutate/stream/bootstrap/async/config) and Tier 2-specific tie-breakers
- [CLI Framework Recipes](skills/agent-cli/references/framework-recipes.md): Idiomatic patterns for Click, argparse, Cobra, clap, Commander, yargs, oclif — Tier 1 across all seven, Tier 2 (--wait, agent-context, profiles, --deliver) for Click/Cobra/Commander/oclif
- [CLI Test Recipes](skills/agent-cli/references/test-recipes.md): Drop-in pytest and vitest snippets that turn the ten principles into CI-enforceable assertions, including agent-context schema validation, --wait synchronicity, profile precedence, and --deliver routing
- [Handoff Output Template](skills/handoff/references/output-template.md): Section-by-section markdown structure for the handoff document
- [Handoff Extraction Checklist](skills/handoff/references/extraction-checklist.md): Eleven categories of detail to pull out of the chat
- [Handoff Code Status Tags](skills/handoff/references/code-status-tags.md): FINAL/SUPERSEDED/REJECTED/DRAFT semantics with truncation prohibition
- [Handoff TXT Format](skills/handoff/references/txt-format.md): Markdown-to-plaintext substitution rules for the .txt variant
- [Rule Card Index](skills/react-shared/references/cards/index.md): Pre-load lookup for the React audit skill suite — lists every shipping card by id and category
- [Rule Card — effects/computing-derived-state](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/computing-derived-state.md): Anti-pattern card for useEffect that derives state from props or other state — bad/good snippets, llm-judge detection criteria, react.dev citation
- [Rule Card — effects/transforming-data-for-render](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/transforming-data-for-render.md): useEffect filters/sorts/maps a list into state instead of computing during render
- [Rule Card — effects/caching-expensive-computation](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/caching-expensive-computation.md): useEffect + useState used as a cache for an expensive computation instead of useMemo
- [Rule Card — effects/resetting-all-state-on-prop-change](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/resetting-all-state-on-prop-change.md): useEffect resets every piece of state when a key-like prop changes instead of remounting via key
- [Rule Card — effects/adjusting-state-on-prop-change](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/adjusting-state-on-prop-change.md): useEffect adjusts one piece of state on prop change instead of adjusting during render with a previous-prop comparison
- [Rule Card — effects/sharing-logic-between-handlers](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/sharing-logic-between-handlers.md): logic shared into useEffect that fires for non-user reasons — belongs in a helper called from each handler
- [Rule Card — effects/sending-post-request](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/sending-post-request.md): POST fired from useEffect in response to user action instead of from the event handler
- [Rule Card — effects/fetching-data](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/fetching-data.md): useEffect + fetch for data loading with no race-condition guard and no framework data primitive
- [Rule Card — effects/chains-of-computations](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/chains-of-computations.md): cascade of useEffects each watching state and triggering the next, causing N+1 rerenders
- [Rule Card — effects/initializing-application](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/initializing-application.md): app-wide initialization placed in a component useEffect instead of module scope, runs twice in Strict Mode
- [Rule Card — effects/notifying-parent-state-changes](skills/react-shared/references/cards/effects/notifying-parent-state-changes.md): useEffect calls onChange when internal state changes instead of calling it from the handler that set the state
- [React Audit Fixtures README](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/README.md): Layout and manual verification procedure for the seeded/clean fixture pair used to verify the Phase 1 tracer-bullet path
- [React Audit Verification Log](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/verification-log.md): Frozen evidence walking the four-module path on both fixtures — Rule Card Library, Code Scanner, Issue Manager, gh-only constraint
- [React Audit Verification Log (P2a)](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/verification-log-p2a.md): Phase 2a evidence — walks all 11 effects cards × 11 seeded fixtures, severity table, cross-card LLM-judge cache restatement
- [React Audit Verification Log (P2b)](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/verification-log-p2b.md): Phase 2b evidence — walks the Smart Scan front step: below-threshold no-prompt path, above-threshold directory-group prompt with accept/reject/subset, exclusion guarantee, threshold-doc check
- [React Audit Above-Threshold Fixture (bulk)](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/above-threshold/_bulk-fixture): 67-file scaffold under `above-threshold/` exercising Phase 2b's threshold prompt — 60 scanned stubs across 4 directories + 7 excluded samples (one per canonical exclusion pattern). Presence-only stubs not individually indexed
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/UserCard.tsx): TSX file with one occurrence of effects/computing-derived-state (useEffect deriving fullName)
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — TodoList](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/TodoList.tsx): one occurrence of effects/transforming-data-for-render
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — ReportTable](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/ReportTable.tsx): one occurrence of effects/caching-expensive-computation
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — ProfilePage](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/ProfilePage.tsx): one occurrence of effects/resetting-all-state-on-prop-change
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — SelectableList](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/SelectableList.tsx): one occurrence of effects/adjusting-state-on-prop-change
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — ProductPage](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/ProductPage.tsx): one occurrence of effects/sharing-logic-between-handlers
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — RegistrationForm](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/RegistrationForm.tsx): one occurrence of effects/sending-post-request
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — FetchUserList](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/FetchUserList.tsx): one occurrence of effects/fetching-data
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — Game](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/Game.tsx): one occurrence of effects/chains-of-computations
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — App](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/App.tsx): one occurrence of effects/initializing-application (hot-path → Blocker)
- [React Audit Seeded Fixture — Toggle](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/seeded/Toggle.tsx): one occurrence of effects/notifying-parent-state-changes
- [React Audit Clean Fixture](skills/react-audit/references/fixtures/clean/UserCard.tsx): TSX file with no anti-patterns (fullName computed during render)

## Workflow

Recommended order: Ask → Blueprint → Carve → Dispatch → TDD. Use Lean at any point.
